$comment: DATE same-origin contract (2026-05-04): the SPA reaches all backends through Caddy at the page origin. /api/* routes to ingest, /auth/* routes to the auth service, /stream/* routes to the kit-app signaling. The local.server / local.signalingPort / local.mediaPort fields below remain for the upstream NVIDIA streaming-library AppStream entry point only — Caddy still terminates TLS and reverse-proxies the kit-app signaling to those ports on the substrate, but the SPA's *own* fetch + WebSocket calls (assets, ingest, ingest lifecycle, whoami) all use same-origin paths via services/apiBase.ts and never read these fields. A future cleanup should route the AppStream signaling through /stream/* same-origin too; until then, the substrate-side ports are still substrate-side facts.

stream.$comment: Optional props if source is set to 'stream'.

gfn.$comment: Required props if source is set to 'gfn'.

local.$comment: Substrate-side kit-app streaming target. Caddy reverse-proxies /stream/* to these ports; the SPA still passes them through the upstream NVIDIA AppStreamer connect path until the kit-app stream signaling is moved behind /stream/* same-origin too.
